dashboard.tagline: Your AI-powered companion from planting to profit. Follow the 4 stages below to get started.
dashboard.builtForDesc: Powered by real government APIs — Agmarknet, OpenWeatherMap, PlantVillage dataset and PM-KISAN schemes. No fake data. No guesswork.

crop.title: Crop Recommendation
crop.desc: Tell us your soil, location, season and budget. Our AI recommends the best crop to grow.

disease.title: Disease Detection
disease.desc: Upload a photo of your crop. Our model detects any disease within seconds with 97% accuracy.

loan.title: Loan Gateway
loan.desc: Get matched to the best government loan scheme. Pre-filled application, zero paperwork.

sell.title: Smart Selling
sell.desc: See live mandi prices across India. Know exactly when and where to sell for maximum profit.

crop.title: Crop Recommendation
crop.subtitle: Use your GPS to auto-detect soil, water & weather — or fill in manually.
crop.detectSubtitle: Detects soil type, water availability, temperature & humidity
crop.detectingMsg: Getting GPS → fetching soil data from SoilGrids → fetching weather from Open-Meteo...
crop.autofillSuccess: All fields below have been auto-filled. You can still change them if needed.
crop.autoWeatherNote: Temperature ({{temp}}°C), humidity ({{humidity}}%) and rainfall will be sent automatically — no OpenWeatherMap key needed.

errors.general: Something went wrong. Check your API keys and Flask service.
errors.locationDenied: Location access denied. Please allow location access and try again, or fill in manually.
errors.locationFail: Could not get your location. Please fill in manually.
errors.autoFillFail: Could not fetch soil and weather data. You can still fill manually.
errors.cityNotFound: City "{{city}}" not found. Try a different spelling.
errors.correctFail: Could not correct location. Try again.

disease.title: Disease Detection
disease.subtitle: Upload a clear photo of a crop leaf for instant disease diagnosis.
disease.modelCoverageDesc: This model detects diseases in {{count}} crop types from the PlantVillage dataset.
disease.unsupportedTitle: Not supported (model not trained on these):
disease.unsupportedWarning: Uploading a mango or wheat leaf will give inaccurate results — the model will guess the closest trained class.
disease.uploadSubhint: JPG, PNG — clear close-up of the leaf works best
disease.loanBtn: Apply for Loan to Cover Treatment → ₹{{cost}}
disease.loanHint: Takes you to Loan Gateway with cost pre-filled
disease.mismatchWarning: Crop mismatch: You selected {{selected}} but the model detected characteristics of {{detected}}. Try a clearer close-up photo of the leaf.
disease.healthyOnlyWarning: {{crop}} — the PlantVillage dataset only contains healthy {{crop}} images. The model cannot reliably detect {{crop}} diseases. Tomato, Potato, Corn, and Apple have the best coverage.

errors.noImage: Please select an image of the crop leaf.
errors.detectFail: Detection failed. Make sure the Flask ML service is running on port 5001.

sell.title: Smart Sell
sell.subtitle: Compare mandi prices and discover the best selling opportunity for your crop.
sell.referenceTag: Reference Data — Add Agmarknet API key for live prices

errors.noData: No price data found for this crop.

loan.title: Loan Gateway
loan.subtitle: Find the best government loan scheme for your situation
loan.fromDiseaseCost: Estimated treatment cost of ₹{{cost}} has been pre-filled below.
